codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - case02_encrypt","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case02_encrypt/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"comma","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT NULLIF(TRIM(CARD_NUMBER), '') AS CARD_NUMBER, NULLIF(TRIM(CARD_HOLDER_NAME), '') AS CARD_HOLDER_NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(EXPIRY_DATE), '') AS EXPIRY_DATE, NULLIF(TRIM(CARD_TYPE), '') AS CARD_TYPE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(CREDIT_LIMIT), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS CREDIT_LIMIT, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(OUTSTANDING_BALANCE), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS OUTSTANDING_BALANCE, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(VERSION_DATE), ''), 'yyyyMMdd') AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case02_encrypt","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case02_encrypt/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
